headline: Is HIG Stock Set for Upside on Strong Pricing and Execution?
summary: HIG leans on pricing gains, tech investment, and underwriting strength to boost performance, but risks from personal insurance and leverage linger.

headline: Hartford (NYSE:HIG) Q4 Earnings: Leading The Multi-Line Insurance Pack
summary: Looking back on multi-line insurance stocks’ Q4 earnings, we examine this quarter’s best and worst performers, including Hartford (NYSE:HIG) and its peers.
